text:
Biscuit's
Snowy Day
*******
by Alyssa Satin Capucilli pictures by Pat Schories

"Come along, Biscuit. It's snowing!
We're going to have a great snowy day!"
Woof, woof!

"I'll put on my mittens and boots."
Woof, woof!
"And here's a cozy sweater for you.
Let's go, sweet puppy!"
Woof!

"We're all going to build a snowman, Biscuit.
Everyone can help roll a big, big snowball!"
Woof, woof!
"Funny puppy!
That's the way!"
Woof!

"The snow is so soft and powdery.
It's perfect for making snow angels."
"And snow puppies, too."
Woof, woof!
Bow, wow!

"Look, Biscuit. It's time to go sledding!
Hold on tight, sweet puppy."
Woof, woof!
0
e
600
0
"Here we go!"
Woof!

"There's nothing like a great snowy day, Biscuit.
There's hot cocoa and treats."
Woof, woof!
"And lots of fun for all!"

Ages 2-6
There is soft, powdery snow everywhere! It's the
perfect day for snow angels, sledding, and snuggling
up with someone you love. Woof!
Look for these other Biscuit board books:

to the Park

Biscuit?

the Neighbors
